figura.docs.silly.set_fly:
Allows overriding if you can fly or not.
Requires cheats.
figura.docs.silly.set_pos:
Sets your player's position.
sendPacket controls whether or not to send a MovePlayer packet instead.
Requires cheats.
figura.docs.silly.set_velocity:
Sets your player's velocity.
Requires cheats.
figura.docs.silly.set_rot:
Sets your player's rotation.
Requires cheats.
figura.docs.silly.set_noclip:
Sets if your player should act like a spectator.
Requires cheats.
figura.docs.silly.cheats_enabled: Returns if cheats are presently enabled.
figura.docs.silly.upload_avatar: Uploads your current avatar to cloud.
figura.docs.silly.load_local_avatar: Loads an avatar from your avatar folder.
figura.docs.silly.get_avatar_nameplate: Returns the nameplates of another avatar.
figura.docs.silly.cat: Sends meow in chat, because half of figura are cats in disguise.
figura.docs.silly.set_block:
Sets a fake block in the world.
Setting a block to nil removes the fake one.
Requires cheats (but runs on clients!)
figura.docs.silly.get_block_entity:
Gets the serverside NBT of a block in the world.
Returns nil if the block isnt a block entity.
Requires OP level >= 2.
figura.docs.silly.set_fake_blocks_enable:
Sets whether or not fake blocks are enabled locally.
Defaults to true.
figura.docs.silly.get_fake_block_info: Gets info about who placed a fake block at a position.
figura.docs.silly.get_figura_debug_strin: Gets the debug data Figura puts in the F3 menu.
figura.docs.silly.set_hud_element_visibl: Sets the visibility of a hud element.
figura.docs.silly.get_version: Returns the current version of SillyPlugin.
figura.docs.silly.set_gravity:
Disables or enables gravity.
Requires cheats.
figura.docs.silly.set_friction:
Sets your friction. False to disable friction.
Requires cheats.
figura.docs.silly.get_permissions: Gets the permissions of an avatar. Defaults to yourself.
figura.docs.silly.set_permission:
Sets the figura permissions of a user.
Pass nil to value to reset to category defaults.
figura.docs.silly.set_permission_categor:
Sets the figura permission category of a user.
Pass nil to reset the user to the default permission category.
figura.docs.silly.ping: Runs one of your avatars pings, even on local.
figura.docs.silly.set_entity_collisions: Sets whether or not you get pushed by other entities.
figura.docs.silly.set_gui_matrix: Transforms the GUI's rendering by the given Matrix4. Passing nil resets it.
figura.docs.silly.disconnect: Disconnects you from the game, with the specified message.
figura.docs.silly.get_profiler: Returns an object that contains timing information for a given avatar. Defaults to yourself.
figura.docs.silly.format_script: Runs figura's code minifiers on the provided string. Defaults to the current set level.
figura.docs.silly.set_subscribe_pings: Forces subscribing to an avatar's pings. Useful for cross-server cross-avatar communication.
figura.docs.silly.get_error:
Gets the error text from another avatar.
Returns nil if there is no error or if the avatar isnt loaded.
figura.docs.silly.get_nano_time:
Gets the value of the JVM's nanosecond clock.
Only useful for checking how long something takes.
figura.docs.silly.update_avatar_size:
Updates the size of the avatar figura shows you.
Only useful in NBT-transforming contexts (like using addScript)
figura.docs.silly.vehicle.set_pos:
Sets your vehicle's position.
Requires cheats.
figura.docs.silly.vehicle.set_velocity:
Sets your vehicle's velocity.
Requires cheats.
figura.docs.silly.vehicle.set_rot:
Sets your vehicle's rotation.
Requires cheats.
figura.docs.silly.profiler: The Silly Nanosecond Profiler for this instance of sillyplugin
figura.docs.silly_profiler.get_times:
Returns a table of each timing.
Pass true to only get the last execution.
figura.docs.silly_profiler.get_render_ev: Gets the time it took to execute the render event the last 60 times.
figura.docs.silly_profiler.get_tick_time: Gets the time it took to execute the tick event the last 60 times.
figura.docs.silly_profiler.get_render_ti: Gets the time it took to render the avatar the last 60 times.
figura.docs.silly_profiler.get_world_tic: Gets the time it took to execute the world tick event the last 60 times.
figura.docs.silly_profiler.get_world_ren: Gets the time it took to execute the world render event the last 60 times.
figura.docs.silly.lua_graphics.is_revoke: Returns if this LuaGraphics instance can no longer be used.
figura.docs.silly.lua_graphics.set_sciss:
Discards anything rendered outside this box.
Pass nil to disable.
(Multiple scissors can be on at once, passing nil will only disable the latest one!)
figura.docs.silly.lua_graphics.pop_pose:
Removes the latest value of the Pose Stack.
See: LuaGraphics:pushPoseMatrix()
figura.docs.silly.lua_graphics.blit: Draws a texture to the screen.
figura.docs.silly.lua_graphics.blit_stri: Draws a string to the screen.
figura.docs.silly.lua_graphics.blit_item: Draws an item to the screen.
figura.docs.silly.lua_graphics.push_pose:
Pushes a matrix onto the Pose Stack.
This will affect all subsequent blits up until the pose is popped.
figura.docs.silly.lua_graphics.blit_enti: Draws an entity to the screen.
figura.docs.silly_backports:
Useful 0.1.6 features, backported.
Exists under the global "silly_backports", or under "silly.backports".
Also see FOX's Misc Figura Backport!
figura.docs.silly_backports.add_script:
Takes a path to the script, the contents of the script, and what side the script should be added to.
If the contents are nil, then the script is removed from the avatar.
Side must be either "NBT", "RUNTIME", or "BOTH". If nil, it will default to "BOTH".
figura.docs.silly_backports.get_script:
Takes a path to the script and returns the contents of the script.
This is different from using avatar:getNBT since the NBT stores byte arrays instead of a string
figura.docs.silly_backports.get_scripts: Returns a table of all scripts in the avatar with the name as the index and the contents as the value. If a string is supplied then all scripts starting with the string will be returned
figura.docs.silly_backports.get_caller: Returns the UUID of the avatar that is calling your stored functions, or 'nil' if there is none (usually because you're not calling it from within a stored function)
figura.docs.silly_backports.pre_render:
Runs at the HEAD of Minecraft's render function
Argument 1 is a number between 0 to 1 for the delta between last tick and the next tick
Argument 2 is a string with the name of the source of this render event (See /figura docs enums render_modes)
sillyplugin.permissions.value.script_exe:
Allows or disallows lua code execution
0 = no scripts
1 = only init & entity_init event
2 = all scripts
Allows setting a limit for how long a lua script can execute.
sillyplugin.permissions.value.print.tool: Whether or not the player can print.
figura.docs.events.error:
Event that's called when your avatar errors.
Return true to stop the error.
figura.docs.events.gui_render:
Event that's called when the GUI is rendering.
Use the LuaGraphics wrapper to draw to the screen.
figura.docs.events.move:
Event that's called when your velocity has been calculated.
Return a Vector3 to overwrite the velocity.
Requires cheats to overwrite.
figura.docs.enum.silly_gui_element: List of valid GUI elements that can be disabled in Sillyplugin.
